prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical street portrait of a young woman leisurely shopping in a covered Japanese arcade street on a sunny afternoon. The camera is close behind and slightly to the side, showing her upper body as she turns back over her shoulder toward the viewer; her face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque brown square censor block. She has long flowing dark brown hair catching warm backlight and moving gently as if in a breeze, with realistic individual strands and glossy highlights. She wears a fitted ribbed off-shoulder charcoal gray short-sleeve top, dark bottoms, and a thin black shoulder strap crossing down her back. In her right hand she holds exactly 1 clear plastic cup of iced coffee with a transparent lid and exactly 1 black straw. Set the scene in a softly blurred pedestrian shopping arcade with tiled pavement, storefront shutters, signs, columns, and a bright arched glass roof receding into the distance. Use warm golden-hour sunlight, shallow depth of field, natural skin tones, realistic fabric texture, cinematic bokeh, and a candid lifestyle photography look. No text, no watermark, no extra people in focus.
